Stake yourImaginary Ones

Join our adventure and earn lots of rewards!

Learn more
  1. 0 IOs Staked
  2. 0 IO Unique Holders
  3. 8888 Imaginary Ones Created

Rewards

Earn a variety of different rewards curated specially for you.

Rank Structure

The longer you stake your IOs, the greater its rank.
Wanderer
1-29 days staked
Adventurer
30-89 days staked
Expeditionist
90-179 days staked
Navigator
180-269 days staked
Seasoned Explorer
270-364 days staked
Multiversal Voyager
>365 days staked

With a higher rank, you unlock better rewards.

Coming Soon

Exciting features coming up to compliment the staking process.

  1. Inventory

    Manage your loot. 🔥 them or throw them away. Your inventory, your rules.

  2. Badges

    (Work in progress)

    Achievements can be earned through specific tasks that can give you certain boosts.

  3. Quests

    Send your IOs out on quests to find goodies.

FAQ

Got a question? Find your answer here, or reach out to us!
